rule.name: React Native Debug Mode Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects React Native debug/development mode usage.
rule.vuln_desc: Debug mode can expose diagnostics and weaken production posture.
rule.developer: Ensure production builds disable debug/developer features.
rule.reviewer: Review build variants and runtime debug toggles. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: React Native Insecure HTTP Usage
rule.vuln_desc: Cleartext transport can expose sensitive app traffic.
rule.developer: Use HTTPS endpoints and strict TLS validation.
rule.reviewer: Audit all API base URLs and network clients. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: React Native AsyncStorage Secret Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely sensitive values being persisted via AsyncStorage.
rule.vuln_desc: AsyncStorage is not suitable for secrets without additional protection.
rule.developer: Use secure storage/keychain abstractions for secrets.
rule.reviewer: Review storage keys and classify sensitive data paths. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: React Native WebView Origin Wildcard
rule.rule_desc: Detects wildcard origin allowlist in React Native WebView.
rule.vuln_desc: Wildcard origins can allow untrusted content loading.
rule.developer: Restrict origin whitelist to trusted domains.
rule.reviewer: Validate WebView origin restrictions and navigation policies. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: React Native WebView JavaScript Bridge
rule.rule_desc: Detects JS bridge/script injection capabilities in React Native WebView.
rule.vuln_desc: Unsafe bridge/script usage can increase injection and data exfiltration risk.
rule.developer: Minimize bridge surface and sanitize message handling.
rule.reviewer: Audit WebView bridge handlers and untrusted content paths. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: React Native Hardcoded Secret Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely hardcoded secret values in React Native code.
rule.vuln_desc: Embedded secrets can be extracted from source or bundles.
rule.developer: Use backend-issued short-lived tokens and secure storage.
rule.reviewer: Verify no long-lived production secrets are bundled. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.
